name: flow-04-rsvp-orchestrator
description: T63 RSVPOrchestrator — ORCHESTRATION archetype. Capacity decrement + RSVP create in ONE atomic op. Idempotent by (attendeeId, eventId).

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: atomic-decrement-create, idempotency by (attendeeId, eventId)
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern for T63: atomic capacity decrement + RSVP create, composite idempotency key
Break T63 into: idempotency check (attendeeId+eventId) → atomic capacity decrement + RSVP write → emit RSVPConfirmed
Generate rsvp-orchestrator.service.ts — capacity decrement + RSVP create in ONE atomic op. Idempotent by (attendeeId, eventId).
Named check validation: atomic_decrement_create, composite_key_idempotency, dna8_ordering
Score generated code 0-100 against T63 iron rules: atomic operation, composite idempotency key, DNA-8
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
